description: Re-found DreamCLI's execution architecture, product truth, docs platform, and tracked delivery workflow.

tasks.title: Define support truth matrix
tasks.description: Create an explicit support matrix covering execution semantics, runtimes, completions, output, prompts, config, testing, and docs. Done when: each major claim has status, evidence paths, and notes about redesign or deferral; shell support honesty is explicit; the matrix can drive docs and backlog decisions.

tasks.title: Define planner contracts
tasks.description: Specify the internal planner/dispatch outcomes and command execution plan shape. Done when: planner outcomes are modeled explicitly, responsibilities are bounded, and the contract is ready to anchor tests and extraction work.

tasks.title: Define resolver contracts
tasks.description: Specify resolved input, precedence guarantees, error aggregation behavior, and source-aware diagnostic expectations. Done when: resolver input/output is explicit, redesign boundaries are noted, and tests can target stable behavior.

tasks.title: Define output policy contracts
tasks.description: Specify output policy concepts for jsonMode, isTTY, verbosity, and activity cleanup. Done when: output policy is separable from rendering, supported shell/output claims are aligned, and later refactors have a stable boundary.

tasks.title: Add planner contract tests
tasks.description: Add black-box tests for root help/version, default command, dispatch outcomes, propagated flag masking, and extraction ordering. Done when: planner behavior can be validated without running handlers and intended behavior is explicitly locked down.

tasks.title: Add resolver matrix tests
tasks.description: Add precedence and error-behavior matrix tests for flags and args across CLI, env, config, prompt, stdin, and defaults. Done when: source order, prompt gating, and aggregation semantics are protected by focused contract suites.

tasks.title: Add executor contract tests
tasks.description: Add tests for hook order, derive/middleware/action execution, cleanup guarantees, and result assembly. Done when: the future shared executor is guarded by boundary tests rather than implementation shape.

tasks.title: Add completion contract tests
tasks.description: Expand completion tests to cover supported shells, nested commands, propagated flags, and root/default behavior. Done when: shell support can be broadened safely and docs claims can point to concrete evidence.

tasks.title: Scaffold shared execution module
tasks.description: Create the new internal execution seam and move common execution flow behind it. Done when: there is a concrete shared execution module with explicit inputs/outputs and a narrow responsibility boundary.

tasks.title: Route testkit through executor
tasks.description: Make testkit consume the shared executor instead of owning the canonical pipeline. Done when: testkit becomes a thin wrapper over the shared execution path and its behavior stays green under existing and new tests.

tasks.title: Route CLI through executor
tasks.description: Make CLI command invocation consume the same shared executor. Done when: CLI and testkit no longer have separate execution ownership paths and command execution behavior is centralized.

tasks.title: Extract runtime preflight
tasks.description: Separate adapter/config/package/stdin/prompt sourcing from planner and executor logic. Done when: runtime preflight is explicit, locally testable, and no longer entangled with dispatch branching.

tasks.title: Extract invocation planner
tasks.description: Pull root help/version/default-command/dispatch/propagation logic into an explicit planner layer. Done when: planner outcomes are represented as a DU and can be reasoned about separately from execution.

tasks.title: Split resolver into focused modules
tasks.description: Decompose resolver code by concern: orchestration, coercion, lookup, and error helpers. Done when: resolver no longer centralizes unrelated logic in one file and behavior remains protected by contract tests.

tasks.title: Redesign resolver error aggregation
tasks.description: Improve aggregated diagnostics and clarify source-aware errors across flags and args. Done when: redesigned error behavior is intentional, documented, and verified by dedicated tests.

tasks.title: Evaluate shared property model
tasks.description: Reduce duplicated flag/arg resolution mechanics where a shared property abstraction actually lowers maintenance cost. Done when: either a shared model is introduced safely or an explicit decision records why not.

tasks.title: Document semantic deltas
tasks.description: Maintain an explicit log of preserved versus redesigned execution semantics during the re-foundation. Done when: major semantic changes are listed clearly enough to drive changelog, docs, and review.

tasks.title: Decouple output policy from rendering
tasks.description: Refactor output internals so policy choice is distinct from concrete rendering and activity handling. Done when: output mode selection is explicit and output behavior is easier to extend and test.

tasks.title: Implement fish completions
tasks.description: Ship real fish shell completion generation. Done when: fish completion generation is implemented, exercised by tests, and reflected truthfully in docs/support surfaces.

tasks.title: Implement PowerShell completions
tasks.description: Ship real PowerShell completion generation. Done when: PowerShell completion generation is implemented, tested, and reflected truthfully in docs/support surfaces.

tasks.title: Align completion support truth
tasks.description: Update support matrix, docs, and type-level shell surfaces to match shipped shell support. Done when: completion claims and implementation fully match across code, tests, and docs.

tasks.title: Build docs preparation pipeline
tasks.description: Add scripts/docs foundation, docs:prepare, generated output directories, and docs wiring. Done when: docs build/dev can regenerate generated artifacts predictably from source inputs.

tasks.title: Generate example pages
tasks.description: Extract metadata from examples and generate an examples index plus detail pages. Done when: each example becomes a searchable docs page with summary, usage, source, and related links.

tasks.title: Prototype example hover path
tasks.description: Validate Twoslash-backed hover on generated example pages against local DreamCLI source. Done when: a boring, stable, examples-only hover path is proven feasible and constraints are documented.

tasks.title: Enable hover on example pages
tasks.description: Integrate hover on example pages using the validated path. Done when: generated example pages offer calm IDE-like hover without becoming necessary for comprehension.

tasks.title: Surface changelog and docs health
tasks.description: Generate docs-visible changelog and docs-health pages from source-of-truth inputs. Done when: release history and factual docs-health metrics are both browsable inside the docs site.

tasks.title: Generate API index
tasks.description: Build a public export inventory grouped by subpath and kind. Done when: every public export appears in a generated API index and the index clearly beats the current manual overview.

tasks.title: Normalize TypeDoc data
tasks.description: Generate TypeDoc JSON and normalize it into a DreamCLI-owned docs model. Done when: reference rendering no longer depends directly on raw TypeDoc output shape.

tasks.title: Enrich meta-schema with TSDoc descriptions
tasks.description: Extract TSDoc comments from schema types (CLISchema, FlagSchema, ArgSchema, etc.) via the normalized TypeDoc data and inject them as description annotations into the definition meta-schema. Done when: the generated meta-schema carries property descriptions derived from source TSDoc, not hand-written strings.

tasks.title: Render symbol pages
tasks.description: Generate per-symbol API reference pages from normalized data. Done when: symbol pages are stable, searchable, deep-linkable, and support links from examples and the API index.

tasks.title: Cross-link docs surfaces
tasks.description: Link guides, examples, hover targets, symbol pages, changelog, and docs health into one coherent docs system. Done when: users can move fluidly between authored docs, examples, and reference surfaces.

tasks.title: Write rationale and limitations docs
tasks.description: Author the explanation pages for trade-offs, decisions, limitations, and workarounds once semantics stabilize. Done when: DreamCLI explains major design choices and known limitations clearly and honestly.

tasks.title: Write migration and troubleshooting docs
tasks.description: Author migration/adoption and troubleshooting guidance after the architecture and truth model settle. Done when: serious adopters have clear guidance for evaluation, switching, and common failure modes.

tasks.title: Harden CI and coverage
tasks.description: Add coverage thresholds, docs generation verification, and align CI descriptions with real behavior. Done when: architecture and docs regressions are harder to introduce silently and CI reflects truth.

tasks.title: Rename package to @kjanat/dreamcli
tasks.description: Rename npm package from 'dreamcli' to '@kjanat/dreamcli'. npm blocks unscoped 'dreamcli' due to typosquat similarity with abandoned 'dream-cli' (v0.2.1, 2014, 6 downloads/week). Update package.json name, all import references in docs/examples, JSR config, publish workflows, and README/docs site references. Done when: npm publish succeeds under the scoped name and all surfaces reference @kjanat/dreamcli consistently.
